evals.expected_output: Full cost report with project breakdown, top sessions, model breakdown, daily spend chart, token cost breakdown, model recommendations, and MCP usage summary if applicable.
expectations: Report includes a PROJECT BREAKDOWN section
Report includes a MODEL BREAKDOWN section
Report includes a TOKEN COST BREAKDOWN section
Report includes a DAILY SPEND section
Report includes a MODEL RECOMMENDATIONS section
Header shows pricing source (either live or hardcoded fallback)
Grand total cost is shown in the header

evals.expected_output: Same report as full analysis but filtered to last 7 days. Period in header should reflect a 7-day window.
expectations: Header period spans 7 days or fewer
Report includes PROJECT BREAKDOWN, MODEL BREAKDOWN, DAILY SPEND sections
If run history exists, a 'vs last run' comparison line appears in the header

evals.expected_output: Report filtered to last 30 days, showing only top 5 most expensive sessions in the TOP SESSIONS table. All other sections (project breakdown, model breakdown, etc.) still show full 30-day aggregates.
expectations: TOP SESSIONS table contains at most 5 rows
Header period spans 30 days or fewer
PROJECT BREAKDOWN still shows all projects (not top-5 limited)

evals.expected_output: MCP-focused report. Standard project breakdown and model breakdown are kept, but Top Sessions / Daily Spend / Token Cost Breakdown / Model Recommendations are replaced by MCP sections: Server Configuration, Tool Usage Breakdown, Context Overhead Analysis, MCP Sessions Detail, and Optimization Recommendations.
expectations: Report includes MCP SERVER CONFIGURATION section
Report includes MCP TOOL USAGE BREAKDOWN section
Report includes CONTEXT OVERHEAD ANALYSIS section
Report includes MCP OPTIMIZATION RECOMMENDATIONS section
Standard MODEL RECOMMENDATIONS section is NOT shown
Standard DAILY SPEND section is NOT shown
